title: FAIR Act
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform.
subjects: Government employee pay, benefits, personnel management
crs_summary: Federal Adjustment of Income Rates Act or the FAIR Act This bill modifies pay rates for federal employees in 2026. Specifically, the bill increases rates under the statutory pay systems and for prevailing rate employees by 3.3% and increases locality pay by 1%.
